name: io.github.minhhq-a1/odoo-pulse
description: An AI business analyst for Odoo ERP (18+) — one-call reports with verdicts, over MCP

environmentVariables.name: ODOO_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Odoo instance, e.g. https://acme.odoo.com

environmentVariables.name: ODOO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Odoo API key (used as the password)

environmentVariables.name: ODOO_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Block all write methods when true (default true)
